resources.string: TTV.LOL is offline. Disable Adblock to view streams in the meantime
Are you sure you want to delete this video?
Your system browser is no longer supported. Please click the button below for a workaround
Show type and change background color
Chat has been cleared by a moderator
First messages and redemptions with text
Error connecting to the server. Please try again
Disable video rendering in the background
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
Time From must be less than To
%s is already banned in this channel.
This room is not in emote-only mode.
This room is already in emote-only mode.
This room is not in followers-only mode.
This room is already in %s followers-only mode.
This room is not in unique-chat mode.
This room is already in unique-chat mode.
This room is not in slow mode.
This room is already in %s-second slow mode.
This room is not in subscribers-only mode.
This room is already in subscribers-only mode.
%1$s is now auto hosting you for up to %2$s viewers.
You cannot ban admin %s. Please email support@twitch.tv if an admin is being abusive.
You cannot ban moderator %s unless you are the owner of this channel.
You cannot ban a staff %s. Please email support@twitch.tv if a staff member is being abusive.
You cannot delete the broadcaster’s messages.
You cannot delete messages from another moderator %s.
There was a problem hosting %s. Please try again in a minute.
Host target cannot be changed more than %s times every half hour.
This channel is unable to be hosted.
%s is banned in this channel. You must unban this user before granting mod status.
%s is already a moderator of this channel.
You cannot set slow delay to more than %s seconds.
You cannot timeout admin %s. Please email support@twitch.tv if an admin is being abusive.
You cannot time a user out for more than %s.
You cannot timeout moderator %s unless you are the owner of this channel.
You cannot timeout staff %s. Please email support@twitch.tv if a staff member is being abusive.
%s is not banned from this channel.
There was a problem exiting host mode. Please try again in a minute.
%s is not a moderator of this channel.
%s is not a VIP of this channel.
Unable to add VIP. Visit the Achievements page on your dashboard to learn how to unlock this feature.
%s is already a VIP of this channel.
%s is banned in this channel. You must unban this user before granting VIP status.
Unable to add VIP. Visit the Achievements page on your dashboard to learn how to unlock additional VIP slots.
%s is now banned from this channel.
Commands available to you in this room (use /help for details): %s More help: https://help.twitch.tv/s/article/chat-commands.
Initiating %s second commercial break. Keep in mind that your stream is still live and not everyone will get a commercial.
The message from %s is now deleted.
You deleted a message from staff %s. Please email support@twitch.tv if a staff member is being abusive.
This room is no longer in emote-only mode.
This room is now in emote-only mode.
This room is no longer in followers-only mode.
This room is now in %s followers-only mode.
This room is now in followers-only mode.
%1$s is now hosting you for up to %2$s viewers.
%s has gone offline. Exiting host mode.
%s host commands remaining this half hour.
You have added %s as a moderator of this channel.
Your message was not sent because it contained too many unprocessable characters. If you believe this is an error, please rephrase and try again.
You are permanently banned from talking in %s.
Your message was not sent because your account is not in good standing in this channel.
This channel does not exist or has been suspended.
Your message was not sent because it is identical to the previous one you sent, less than 30 seconds ago.
This room is in emote-only mode. You can find your currently available emoticons using the smiley in the chat text area.
This room is in %1$s followers-only mode. Follow %2$s to join the community!
This room is in %1$s followers-only mode. You have been following for %2$s. Continue following to chat!
This room is in followers-only mode. Follow %s to join the community!
This room is in unique-chat mode and the message you attempted to send is not unique.
Your message was not sent because you are sending messages too quickly.
Hey! Your message is being checked by mods and has not been sent.
Your message wasn’t posted due to conflicts with the channel’s moderation settings.
This room is in slow mode and you are sending messages too quickly. You will be able to talk again in %s seconds.
This room is in subscribers only mode. To talk, purchase a channel subscription at https://www.twitch.tv/products/%s/ticket?ref=subscriber_only_mode_chat.
You don’t have permission to perform that action.
You are timed out for %s more seconds.
This room requires a verified account to chat. Please verify your account at https://www.twitch.tv/settings/security.
There are no moderators of this channel.
You don’t have permission to perform that action.
This channel does not have any VIPs.
No channel is currently being hosted.
This room is no longer in unique-chat mode.
This room is now in unique-chat mode.
You already have a raid in progress.
Sorry, you have more viewers than the maximum currently supported by raids right now.
There was a problem raiding %s. Please try again in a minute.
This channel is intended for mature audiences.
This channel has follower- or subscriber-only chat.
The moderators of this channel are: %s
This room is no longer in slow mode.
This room is now in slow mode. You may send messages every %s seconds.
This room is no longer in subscribers-only mode.
This room is now in subscribers-only mode.
%s is not timed out from this channel.
The community has closed channel %s due to Terms of Service violations.
Only turbo users can specify an arbitrary hex color. Use one of the following instead: %s.
Sorry, “%s” is not available through this client.
%s is no longer banned from this channel.
You have removed %s as a moderator of this channel.
You do not have an active raid.
There was a problem stopping the raid. Please try again in a minute.
%s is permanently banned. Use “/unban” to remove a ban.
%s is no longer timed out in this channel.
You have removed %s as a VIP of this channel.
Usage: \"/ban <username> [reason]\" - Permanently prevent a user from chatting. Reason is optional and will be shown to the target user and other moderators. Use \"/unban\" to remove a ban.
Usage: \"/clear\" - Clear chat history for all users in this room.
Usage: \"/color <color>\" - Change your username color. Color must be in hex (#000000) or one of the following: %s.
Usage: \"/commercial [length]\" - Triggers a commercial. Length (optional) must be a positive number of seconds.
Usage: \"/delete <msg id>\" - Deletes the specified message. For more information, see https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/irc/commands/#clearmsg-twitch-commands.
Usage: \"/emoteonly\" - Enables emote-only mode (only emoticons may be used in chat). Use \"/emoteonlyoff\" to disable.

Usage: \"/followers [duration]\" - Enables followers-only mode (only users who have followed for \'duration\' may chat). Examples: \"30m\", \"1 week\", \"5 days 12 hours\". Must be less than 3 months.
Usage: \"/help\" - Lists the commands available to you in this room.
Usage: \"/host <channel>\" - Host another channel. Use \"/unhost\" to unset host mode.
Usage: \"/marker <optional comment>\" - Adds a stream marker (with an optional comment, max 140 characters) at the current timestamp. You can use markers in the Highlighter for easier editing.
Usage: \"/me <message>\" - Express an action in the third-person.
Usage: \"/mod <username>\" - Grant moderator status to a user. Use \"/mods\" to list the moderators of this channel.
Usage: \"/mods\" - Lists the moderators of this channel.
Usage: \"/uniquechat\" - Enables unique-chat mode. Use \"/uniquechatoff\" to disable.
Usage: \"/raid <channel>\" - Raid another channel. Use \"/unraid\" to cancel the Raid.
Usage: \"/slow [duration]\" - Enables slow mode (limit how often users may send messages). Duration (optional, default=%s) must be a positive number of seconds. Use \"/slowoff\" to disable.
Usage: \"/subscribers\" - Enables subscribers-only mode (only subscribers may chat in this channel). Use \"/subscribersoff\" to disable.

Usage: \"/timeout <username> [duration][time unit] [reason]\" - Temporarily prevent a user from chatting. Duration (optional, default=10 minutes) must be a positive integer; time unit (optional, default=s) must be one of s, m, h, d, w; maximum duration is 2 weeks. Combinations like 1d2h are also allowed. Reason is optional and will be shown to the target user and other moderators. Use \"/untimeout\" to remove a timeout.
Usage: \"/unban <username>\" - Removes a ban on a user.
Usage: \"/unmod <username>\" - Revoke moderator status from a user. Use \"/mods\" to list the moderators of this channel.
Usage: \"/untimeout <username>\" - Removes a timeout on a user.
Usage: \"/unvip <username>\" - Revoke VIP status from a user. Use \"/vips\" to list the VIPs of this channel.
Usage: \"/user <username>\" - Display information about a specific user on this channel.
Usage: \"/vip <username>\" - Grant VIP status to a user. Use \"/vips\" to list the VIPs of this channel.
Usage: \"/vips\" - Lists the VIPs of this channel.
You have added %s as a vip of this channel.
The VIPs of this channel are: %s.
You have been banned from sending whispers.
That user has been banned from receiving whispers.
You are sending whispers too fast. Try again in a minute.
You are sending whispers too fast. Try again in a second.
Your settings prevent you from sending this whisper.
That user’s settings prevent them from receiving this whisper.
Keep chat connected in the background
Keep screen on when video is paused

You can log in using an external browser. After you press \"Authorize\", a page with an error should appear. Copy the url, return here and click the \"Enter url\" button. Paste the url and click \"Log in\"
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
No available storage detected (most likely the phone is connected to a computer).
The maximum duration of media that the player will attempt to buffer, in milliseconds
The minimum duration of media that the player will attempt to ensure is buffered at all times, in milliseconds
The duration of media that must be buffered for playback to start or resume following a user action such as a seek, in milliseconds
The default duration of media that must be buffered for playback to resume after a rebuffer, in milliseconds
The maximum playback speed the player can use to catch up when trying to reach the target live offset. Leave empty for default
The minimum playback speed the player can use to fall back when trying to reach the target live offset. Leave empty for default
The player will attempt to get close to this live offset during playback if possible. Leave empty for default
Show icon next to view count
Open viewer list from view count
Random color for users without color
Show time left on bookmarked vods
Skip by default, don\'t skip if playback fails
Don\'t skip by default, skip if playback fails
Storage permission is required to download videos.
\"$channel\" will be replaced with channel login
Time To must be greater than From
To can\'t be greater than video length
Your session has expired. Please log in again
Switch to audio only track in the background
Use tabs layout for following page
Use tabs layout for game page
Use tabs layout for saved page
This video is only available to subscribers
Ignore auto deletion for this user
